---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Get in Touch

I'd love to connect! You can reach me through any of the following:

| Platform | Link |
|----------|------|
| {{< fa envelope >}} Email | [mvmeghana9@gmail.com](mailto:mvmeghana9@gmail.com) |
| {{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn | [Meghana V Murthy](https://www.linkedin.com/in/meghana-v-murthy/){target="_blank"} |
| {{< fa brands github >}} GitHub | [55megh](https://github.com/55megh){target="_blank"} |

## References

Available upon request.
